title: rosa glutinosa var. thuretii
intro: Rosa glutinosa var. thuretii, also known as the Rosa glutinosa, is a species of fragrant, deciduous shrub in the rose family, native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa glutinosa var. thuretii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
